note: Raw channel funnel inputs only (market size, reach, capture/lead/conversion/repeat/referral rates, group size, planned spend). CAC, LTV, ROI, gross profit, revenue and payback are intentionally NOT stored — the source workbook's own cached formulas for these were broken (#VALUE!/blank) for most rows, which is a live demonstration of why this architecture computes every KPI at request time from raw facts instead of trusting a stored/cached number.

channels.name: Malpe Beach Kiosk
channels.description: Branded booking counter at Malpe Beach entry/parking area. Physical touchpoint for walk-in visitors.
channels.recommendation: HIGHEST PRIORITY. Lowest CAC of all channels. Capture footfall at source. Immediate ROI.

channels.name: Hotel & Resort Partnerships
channels.description: Commission-based referral agreements with 3★+ hotels and beach resorts in Udupi/Manipal corridor.
channels.recommendation: TOP PRIORITY. Hotels incentivized by 12% commission. Warm, qualified leads. Scale to 30+ hotels.

channels.name: Luxury Resort In-Room Material
channels.description: In-room brochures, QR codes on room TV, front desk display at premium resorts.
channels.recommendation: EXPAND. Low cost (print+logistics), high intent audience. Bundle with hotel concierge.

channels.name: Homestay Network
channels.description: Partnership with registered homestays. Owners act as booking agents for commission.
channels.recommendation: DEVELOP. Lower ticket value customer but high volume potential. Focus on 50+ homestays near beach.

channels.name: Travel Agencies (Offline)
channels.description: Commission partnerships with offline travel agencies in Udupi, Mangalore, Bangalore.
channels.recommendation: ACTIVATE. High group size (4.5 avg). Pre-packaged tours guarantee minimum bookings per slot.

channels.name: Tour Operators (OTAs & Packages)
channels.description: MakeMyTrip, Cleartrip, Viator listing + offline tour package integration.
channels.recommendation: LIST IMMEDIATELY. OTA visibility critical. Budget covers listing fees + content creation.

channels.name: Taxi & Cab Partnerships
channels.description: Referral agreements with cab operators (Ola/Uber drivers, private cabs) for tourist dropoffs.
channels.recommendation: TEST. Low investment. Cab drivers earn ₹100–150/referral. WhatsApp group coordination model.

channels.name: Auto Rickshaw Network
channels.description: Local auto drivers near Malpe Beach, Udupi city as referral agents. Commission per booking.
channels.recommendation: TEST CAUTIOUSLY. High volume potential but low conversion and low group size. Quick win if managed.

channels.name: Mangalore Airport Promotion
channels.description: Standee/brochure display at Mangalore International Airport arrival hall. Tie-up with tourism desk.
channels.target_audience: Air travelers, NRI tourists, corporate travelers
channels.recommendation: DEVELOP. Airport catchment: 800K pax/year (Mangalore airport 2023). NRI and premium segment.

channels.name: Udupi Railway Station Promotion
channels.description: Display boards, brochure rack at Udupi station. Partnership with tourist info counter.
channels.target_audience: Rail travelers, domestic tourists in transit
channels.recommendation: LOW PRIORITY near-term. High volume but low conversion. Cost-effective once brand is established.

channels.name: Bus Stand Promotion
channels.description: KSRTC bus stand Udupi and Malpe stand. Brochure + QR board display.
channels.recommendation: DEFER. Very low conversion rate. Revisit in Phase 3 when brand recognition higher.

channels.name: Google Search Ads
channels.description: Search campaigns targeting 'boat trip udupi', 'catamaran cruise malpe', 'things to do udupi' etc.
channels.recommendation: ACTIVATE DAY 1. Highest intent channel. ROAS 4–10x achievable. Start ₹10K/month, scale on ROI.

channels.name: Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram)
channels.description: Awareness + retargeting campaigns on Meta. Video reels of cruise experience. Carousel ads.
channels.recommendation: ACTIVATE. Best for awareness and demand creation. Instagram Stories + Reels. Retarget website visitors.

channels.name: Instagram Ads (Stories & Reels)
channels.description: Dedicated Instagram placements — Stories, Reels, Explore feed. Visual-first content strategy.
channels.recommendation: BUNDLE WITH META. Separate creative strategy for Instagram. UGC reposting key. Influencer seeding.

channels.name: YouTube Pre-Roll Ads
channels.description: 15–30 second pre-roll ads on YouTube targeting travel, tourism, and Udupi/Karnataka content.
channels.recommendation: TEST IN PHASE 2. Lower intent than search but good for consideration stage. 30-sec cinematic reel.

channels.name: Micro-Influencers (Travel, 10K–100K)
channels.description: Instagram/YouTube travel micro-influencers visiting Udupi/Malpe. Hosted experiences in exchange for content.
channels.recommendation: HIGH PRIORITY. 6–12 micro-influencers/year at ₹10K/post. Authentic content drives bookings. Track UTM.

channels.name: Nano-Influencers (MAHE Students, 1K–10K)
channels.description: MAHE student content creators. Hosted free trip in exchange for reel + story. Ultra-local reach.
channels.recommendation: IMMEDIATE WIN. ₹30K budget for 10 nano-influencers. Very high conversion due to local authenticity.

channels.name: Food & Lifestyle Bloggers
channels.description: Invite regional food/lifestyle bloggers for onboard dining experience. Karnataka/Goa travel community.
channels.recommendation: DEVELOP. Partner with Mangalore/Udupi food bloggers. Bundle with seafood experience on board.

channels.name: Corporate Team Outings (MICE)
channels.description: Direct corporate sales to IT companies, manufacturing, healthcare in Mangalore-Manipal corridor.
channels.target_audience: Corporate employees, HR managers, event organizers
channels.recommendation: HIGH VALUE. Avg group 20–30 pax, charter rate applies. 1 corporate deal = 30% monthly revenue target.

channels.name: Wedding Charters
channels.description: Private catamaran for wedding events, sundowner parties, couple photography sessions.
channels.recommendation: PREMIUM SEGMENT. Charter rate ₹25,000/trip. Avg wedding group 35 pax = full vessel. 1 wedding/week = ₹3.25L/mo.

channels.name: Destination Wedding Packages
channels.description: Full-day catamaran package for destination weddings. Photography, catering coordination.
channels.recommendation: LUXURY TIER. High revenue per event (₹1.5–3L). Requires relationship with 5–10 premium planners.

channels.name: Birthday & Anniversary Events
channels.description: Private bookings for birthdays, anniversaries, proposals, sunset experiences.
channels.recommendation: HIGH REPEAT + REFERRAL. Birthday groups self-refer. Social media sharing is built-in marketing.

channels.name: College & Institution Events
channels.description: Official MAHE and other college trip bookings. Freshers outings, farewell events, department trips.
channels.recommendation: BULK BOOKINGS. Group of 25+ triggers charter. MAHE alone: 18 faculties × 2 events/year = 36 potential events.

channels.name: MAHE Student Ambassador Program
channels.description: Official campus ambassador network. Students earn commission per booking generated through personal referral link.
channels.recommendation: BEST CAC IN PORTFOLIO. ₹36K investment. Expected 100+ bookings from student network. Start with 20 ambassadors.

channels.name: Local Resident Word-of-Mouth
channels.description: Local Malpe/Udupi residents as brand ambassadors. Family recommendations to visiting relatives.
channels.target_audience: Local residents, visiting family/friends of locals
channels.recommendation: ORGANIC CHANNEL. Minimal spend needed — quality experience drives this. Resident loyalty program key.

channels.name: NRI Tourist Segment
channels.description: NRIs visiting family in Udupi/Mangalore corridor. Premium-spend, brand-conscious segment.
channels.target_audience: NRI visitors from Gulf, UK, USA, Canada
channels.recommendation: HIGH VALUE PER BOOKING. NRIs spend 2–3x domestic tourist average. Target via Gulf + UK social media ads.

channels.name: Referral Program
channels.description: Formal refer-a-friend program. Referring customer gets ₹150 credit; referred customer gets ₹100 off.
channels.recommendation: FLYWHEEL MULTIPLIER. Lowest CAC (₹100–200). Every happy customer generates 1.8 referrals (Nielsen 2023).

channels.name: Loyalty Program
channels.description: Coral Adventures loyalty card. 5th trip free, onboard discount progression, exclusive member events.
channels.recommendation: RETENTION DRIVER. Increases repeat rate from 20% to 40%+. Implement after 500 customers acquired.

channels.name: QR Code Campaigns
channels.description: QR codes at hotels, restaurants, cafes, auto stands linking to instant booking page.
channels.recommendation: LOW COST, HIGH SCALABILITY. Print + digital QR at 200 touchpoints. ₹15K for 500 QR stands/stickers.

channels.name: Government Tourism Board (KSTDC)
channels.description: Official listing on Karnataka Tourism website, joint promotion, KSTDC Udupi office display.
channels.target_audience: All Karnataka domestic tourists researching online
channels.recommendation: CREDIBILITY MULTIPLIER. KSTDC listing is free/low cost but adds massive credibility. Priority application.

channels.name: Wedding Planner Network
channels.description: Empanelment with 20+ wedding planners in Udupi/Mangalore/Bangalore for catamaran bookings.
channels.recommendation: HIGH VALUE PER BOOKING. Wedding planners bill ₹25–50K for catamaran coordination. Empanel 20+ planners.

channels.name: Event Management Companies
channels.description: Corporate event planners, concert organizers, Udupi/Mangalore event companies for group bookings.
channels.recommendation: DEVELOP RELATIONSHIPS. 1 event company can deliver 10+ group bookings/year. Target 10 companies.

channels.name: Sponsorship & Brand Tie-ups
channels.description: Co-sponsorship with travel brands, coconut water/beverage brands, lifestyle brands for onboard branding.
channels.recommendation: DEFER TO PHASE 3. Revenue stream (not cost). Brands pay for onboard logo placement. Min 5K pax needed.

channels.name: Package Bundling (Hotels + Cruise)
channels.description: Co-packaged deals with hotels — hotel stay + catamaran cruise at bundled rate. Hotel sells, we fulfill.
channels.recommendation: HIGH POTENTIAL. Hotels actively want activity packages. Start with 5 anchor hotel partners.

channels.name: Cross-Promotions (Restaurants & Cafes)
channels.description: Mutual referral with popular seafood restaurants, beach shacks. Coral Adventures menus on tables.
channels.recommendation: EASY WIN. Negligible cost. Exchange table cards. 20 restaurant partners, mutual promotion.
